task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the ManageEngine ADAudit Plus web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ManageEngine ADAudit Plus logo or header should be visible in the web browser.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the IP-to-Location mapping configuration section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The UI should display a section or page titled 'IP Location', 'Location Mapping', 'Subnet Mapping', or similar configuration interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the location name 'Austin Innovation Hub' is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Austin Innovation Hub' should be visible in a 'Location Name' or 'Site' input field, or displayed in a summary table of locations.

task_completion.description: Verify the description 'New R&D Facility - Bldg 4' is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'New R&D Facility - Bldg 4' should be visible in a 'Description' input field or corresponding table column.

task_completion.description: Verify the IP range 10.55.0.0 to 10.55.255.255 is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The start IP '10.55.0.0' and end IP '10.55.255.255' (or equivalent subnet mask if applicable) should be visible in the IP range input fields or table columns.

task_completion.description: Verify the new IP-to-Location mapping was successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The newly created 'Austin Innovation Hub' mapping should appear as a saved entry in the list/table of configured IP locations, or a clear success message indicating the location was added.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser (e.g., Chrome, Edge) navigating the ADAudit Plus interface, not terminal commands or API testing tools like Postman.

integrity.description: Verify the interaction is with the actual ADAudit Plus application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show 'localhost:8081' or the appropriate local IP, and the UI should match standard ManageEngine ADAudit Plus styling.

integrity.description: Verify the final result was not faked using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (F12) should not be open, and the layout of the saved locations table should look consistent and properly aligned.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected location name is 'Austin Innovation Hub'. The expected description is 'New R&D Facility - Bldg 4'. The expected IP range starts at '10.55.0.0' and ends at '10.55.255.255'. The application should be accessed via http://localhost:8081.
